scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix worker run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix frontend test && node ./scripts/frontend-smoke.mjs && npm --prefix worker run smoke:e2e
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:agent
scripts.local-deploy:test: npm run build && npm --prefix worker run local-deploy:coverage && npm --prefix frontend run smoke:visual
scripts.deploy: npm run build && node ./worker/node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js deploy --config wrangler.toml
